description: A weary and determined detective, embodying the relentless human struggle against an incomprehensible horror, marked by fatigue and a somber resolve.
prompt: A close-up portrait of a grizzled, middle-aged male detective. His face is etched with fatigue and concern, sharp eyes squinting slightly, illuminated by the cold, diffused light of an overcast day. He wears a rumpled, dark trench coat and a tie slightly askew. The background is a blurred, desaturated forest canopy. The global mood is eerie, unsettling, with low saturation, emphasizing cold blues and deep greens.
global_mood: Eerie, unsettling, and mysterious with an underlying tone of body horror and dread. Emphasize cold blues, deep greens, and stark contrasts. Overcast lighting, low saturation.
